body.title: Create /research skill — CC-side interface to uuresearch
body.result: /research skill created at skills/research/SKILL.md — wraps uuresearch with graceful offline degradation
body.intention: I intend that /research is a usable CC skill backed by the uuresearch.py script that already exists.
body.description:
uuresearch.py and ~/bin/uuresearch exist and work. No skill file exists so /research is unavailable inside Claude Code sessions. This ticket creates the SKILL.md.

The skill should: (1) accept a topic/question as args, (2) call uuresearch.py via Bash with those args, (3) surface the summarized result inline. Should gracefully degrade when librarian/embedding pipeline is offline.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/research/SKILL.md (new)
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — skill file only. OUT — changes to uuresearch.py or the underlying research pipeline.
**Completion criteria:** /research <topic> runs in a CC session and returns a summarized research result; graceful message when offline.

CC.0 acked at 2026-06-15T20:40:04Z
